steps.title: Use the marker clue
steps.content: The text says ephemeral objects are useful as markers of cultural change. As markers, they can show or record shifts in norms, values, and concerns that traditional historical objects may miss.

steps.title: Reject wrong actions
steps.content: B means to justify or clear from blame. C means to prevent. D means to cause. The sentence needs a verb meaning to show or record cultural shifts. The answer is A.
